roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT MOTION FOR AN ORDER RELEASING DEFT ON ACM FILED
DEFT BAIL HRG & ORDER RELEASING DEFT ON OR OR BAIL REDUCTION FILED

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING & MOTION TO RELEASE ON ACM/X:THE PEOPLE CALL NOTREADY/ACM/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE ON CURFEW FROM 6PM TO 8AM/WEAP/WS/RX//CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL COME TO ALL FUTURE COURT DATES/X:AS A CONDITION OFRELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD//CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 1 HOUR/DOP/

/CAL:ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/X:DEFENDANT IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR ACM ICR/ACM//X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICEAND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO BE ON HOME DETENTION/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:12-22-20 (30TH)/987,2/NB/X:WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD ACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TOPRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING & ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOP/
/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/X: SHERIFF AFFIDAVIT WARRANT DISCHARGED/EMTERM
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DAWT/X:THE PEOPLE TAKE A 1ST DISMISSAL/MO PC 1385:WITNESS UNAVAILABLE/
/CAL:PREIMINARY HEARING/CTORD:GOOD CAUSE FOUND TO GO PAST THE 30TH DAY OF12-22-20/CONT/DOP/
